product_overview: Spare Parts ERP is a desktop inventory and operations management system for spare parts businesses, covering authentication, inventory, sales, purchasing, parties, expenses, accounting, and settings. It is designed to support efficient day-to-day workflows with browser-testable UI flows backed by a mocked Electron/SQLite environment in preview mode.
core_goals: Provide secure login and session-gated access to business modules
Enable efficient inventory monitoring, including low-stock visibility and barcode-oriented workflows
Support POS sales operations with customer selection, discounts, taxes, and payment confirmation
Manage purchase invoices and supplier interactions for stock replenishment
Maintain customer and supplier directories with ledger/statements access
Track operational expenses and cashbox balance changes
Deliver accounting visibility through balance sheet and income statement views
Allow administrators to configure global settings, users, and printer preferences

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to access the ERP through the login screen and verify their session before using protected modules.
user_flows: GET /login -> Receive 200 with login HTML page -> Submit valid admin credentials through the login UI -> Receive authenticated session/token in client state -> Navigate to protected modules
GET /login -> Receive 200 with login HTML page -> Submit invalid credentials -> Receive authentication error message and remain on login screen
Attempt GET /dashboard without an authenticated session -> Receive access denied/redirect behavior -> User is returned to /login

features.name: Dashboard & Summary
features.description: Shows a quick operational overview including stats, inventory alerts, and recent transactions.
user_flows: GET /dashboard with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with dashboard HTML page -> View quick stats, inventory alerts, and recent transactions
GET /dashboard without a valid authenticated session -> Receive redirect or unauthorized access response -> User is sent back to /login

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Lets users view the inventory table and inspect items that are below safety stock thresholds.
user_flows: GET /inventory with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with inventory HTML page -> Review parts list, stock levels, and barcode-related inventory details
GET /low-stock with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with low-stock HTML page -> Review items below safety stock thresholds
GET /inventory without authentication -> Receive unauthorized/redirect response -> Access to inventory is blocked

features.name: POS & Sales
features.description: Provides the point-of-sale checkout screen and sales history ledger for completing and reviewing sales transactions.
user_flows: GET /pos with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with POS HTML page -> Create or select a customer, add products, apply discounts and taxes, and confirm payment in the checkout flow
GET /sales with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with sales HTML page -> Review sales history and invoice ledger entries
GET /pos without authentication -> Receive unauthorized/redirect response -> Checkout screen remains inaccessible

features.name: Purchase Operations
features.description: Supports purchasing stock from suppliers through the purchases ledger and new purchase invoice form.
user_flows: GET /purchases with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with purchases HTML page -> Review purchase ledger entries and prior invoices
GET /purchases/new with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with purchase form HTML page -> Select a supplier, enter item quantities and costs, and prepare a purchase invoice
GET /purchases/new without authentication -> Receive unauthorized/redirect response -> New purchase creation is blocked

features.name: Customer & Supplier Directory
features.description: Displays customer and supplier lists, along with ledger statement information for each party.
user_flows: GET /customers with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with customers HTML page -> Browse customer directory and open statement details
GET /suppliers with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with suppliers HTML page -> Browse supplier directory and open statement details
GET /customers without authentication -> Receive unauthorized/redirect response -> Customer directory is not shown

features.name: Expenses & Cashbox
features.description: Lets users record operational expenses and manage the cash balance associated with day-to-day operations.
user_flows: GET /expenses with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with expenses HTML page -> Log an expense and observe the cash balance update in the UI
GET /expenses without authentication -> Receive unauthorized/redirect response -> Expense tracking interface is blocked

features.name: Accounting Reports
features.description: Provides access to financial statements including the balance sheet and income statement.
user_flows: GET /accounting with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with accounting HTML page -> Review balance sheet and income statement data
GET /accounting without authentication -> Receive unauthorized/redirect response -> Accounting reports are not accessible

features.name: Settings Manager
features.description: Allows administrators to manage global settings, users, and printer preferences.
user_flows: GET /settings with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with settings HTML page -> Update global settings, user preferences, or printer options
GET /settings without authentication -> Receive unauthorized/redirect response -> Settings panel is not accessible
